Container.Name: odysseus-omnibus
Container.Overview:
Odysseus, all in one container - PewDiePie's self-hosted AI workspace (chat, autonomous agents, tools, deep research, email, image generation, notes). This "omnibus" image bundles everything: the app + ChromaDB (memory) + SearXNG (web search) + ntfy (notifications). One container, one click, no extra wiring.
LLM: Odysseus does not ship a model. Point "LLM Host" at your Ollama / vLLM / llama.cpp endpoint. The default host.docker.internal reaches services on the Unraid host (e.g. an Ollama on 11434). Other model providers and API keys (OpenAI, OpenRouter, etc.) are added in the app's Settings after login.
FIRST LOGIN: leave Admin Password blank and a generated one is printed to this container's log (search it for "password"), or set your own below. Change it in Settings after logging in.
ADVANCED: each bundled service can be turned off (Embed ChromaDB/SearXNG/ntfy = false) and pointed at an external container instead - so you are never locked into the bundle.
Container.Description: All-in-one Odysseus AI workspace (app + chromadb + searxng + ntfy in one container). Bring your own LLM endpoint.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: All persistent data: database, memory (chroma), search config, ntfy cache, uploads, SSH keys.

Config.Name: HuggingFace Cache
Config.Description: Downloaded models / embeddings - can grow to many GB. Put on a fast pool (e.g. /mnt/cache/...) for quick boots; ownership is repaired here on start.

Config.Name: LLM Host
Config.Description: Hostname of your Ollama / vLLM / llama.cpp server. host.docker.internal = the Unraid host. Use an IP for a remote server.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Initial admin password. Leave blank to have one generated and printed to the container log on first boot.

Config.Name: Auth Enabled
Config.Description: Require login. Keep true unless behind your own auth proxy.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID the services run as. 99 = Unraid 'nobody'.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID the services run as. 100 = Unraid 'users'.

Config.Name: Embed ChromaDB
Config.Description: Run ChromaDB inside this container. Set false to use an external ChromaDB - then set CHROMADB_HOST/PORT.

Config.Name: Embed SearXNG
Config.Description: Run SearXNG web search inside this container. Set false to use an external one - then set SearXNG Instance.

Config.Name: Embed ntfy
Config.Description: Run ntfy notifications inside this container. Set false to use an external one - then set ntfy Base URL.

Config.Name: External ChromaDB Host
Config.Description: Only when Embed ChromaDB = false: host of your external ChromaDB.

Config.Name: External SearXNG Instance
Config.Description: Only when Embed SearXNG = false: URL of your external, JSON-enabled SearXNG.

Config.Name: External ntfy Base URL
Config.Description: Only when Embed ntfy = false: URL of your external ntfy server.
